chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：下一个杀手级AI产品，会出现在哪个赛道？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
下一个杀手级AI产品，是眼镜、是Agent，还是某个尚未命名的“物理世界入口”？这场圆桌没有标准答案，却达成一个共识：单纯套壳大模型的应用注定短命，只有长期在线、连接物理世界、能完成真实交互闭环的产品，才可能成为下一个百亿级赛道。从AI眼镜到具身智能，入口之争已悄然打响。

硬件先行还是生态为王？C端规模还是B端付费？最终指向同一个逻辑：纯套壳应用、弱交互硬件注定被淘汰，只有“多模态底座+AI原生智能体+可穿戴硬件”三位一体，才能让AI从聊天框真正走进现实。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

<

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？

一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点会比预想来得更快。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

郑王宇丨36氪基金投资副总裁（主持）

龚毅丨

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
chinese_news.summary:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。

只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

帮主丨36氪《AI局内人》主播（主持）

郑鹏宇丨杭州颜柯教育科技有限公司创始人

肖玛峰丨AI招聘平台TTC创始

chinese_news.title: 对话王小川：离开通用人工智能的主干道之后
chinese_news.summary:
“如果没有转型，继续走主流道路，你也会有同等程度的焦虑。”王小川说，这次转型，让他真正回归到从创业第一天就最想做的事情：造AI医生。

访谈｜邓咏仪 杨轩

文｜邓咏仪

一年前，王小川带着百川智能来了一次激烈的“大刹车”：大幅缩减通用模型团队，关闭金融等多条行业线，All in医疗大模型。但与此同时，整个大模型行业却热闹非凡，大厂和创业公司轮番进行“轰炸

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：AI浓度与转化率：数字体验的实战增长法则
chinese_news.summary:
AI浓度并非越高越好，转化率的秘密在于人机共生的平衡点。

“AI应像手机一样贯穿全流程”，而面对亲子游客和老年群体，主动将AI浓度降至50%，却实现了超50%的转化率。浓度的关键是以人为本、文化温度先行。

以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

崔健南丨广州搞搞镇文化科技创始人兼CEO

杨晟丨珀乐互动科技创始人

薛冰：各位嘉宾大家下午好，我是主持人薛冰，很荣幸受到36氪

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 北大项目孵化，国内首家原生机器人“大脑芯片”企业获数亿元融资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，北京维泛智能科技有限公司（以下简称“维泛智能”）近日完成数亿元种子轮融资，由中关村资本及旗下启航投资联合领投，上海未来产业基金、石溪资本、佰维存储、燕创集团、海益投资、探元创投共同投资。

维泛智能成立于2025年5月，孵化自北京大学类脑芯片实验室（PAICORE Lab），专注于具身智能“大小脑”融合芯片研发，致力于打造全国产化机器人核心计算方案。

联合创始人殷积磊毕业于北京大学，拥有超过20年半导体行业经验，曾任知存科技COO兼研发副总裁，以及IBM、GlobalFoundries芯片研发总监，并曾在MTK、VIA等企业从事芯片研发工作。团队核心成员均来自IBM、华为、腾讯等行业头部企业。

随着具身智能快速发展，机器人“大脑”算法持续演进，对通用芯片平台提出了更高要求。机器人“大脑”芯片不仅需要承载多模态感知与AI推理，还需要兼顾运动控制等核心计算任务，是机器人完成交互、决策与执行的“中枢神经”。

chinese_news.title: 用AI来管公司，Moka推出三款AI HR工具｜涌现新栏目
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜梁键强

编辑｜王毓婵

一句话介绍

Moka为AI人力资源软件服务商，早期从智能化招聘管理系统起步，后逐步扩展至更完整的HR管理系统。5月，Moka上线了招聘Eva、人事Eva和BPEva三款AI HR产品。

招聘Eva覆盖招聘全流程，辅助企业完成识人、筛选和面试；人事Eva聚焦报表处理、流程流转和员工咨询等重复事务；BPEva则用于动态更新人才画像，辅助企业进行人才识别和组织决策。

支撑这三款产品的是Moka AI工坊，它相当于底层能力平台，可以让企业用业务语言描述需求，具有快速响应、个性化定制和安全上线等能力。

chinese_news.title: 千禧年流行的老式漂亮饭，居然翻红了
chinese_news.summary:
过去这几年，餐饮行业的新店越开越多，淘汰速度也越来越快。精致餐饮仍在发展，但人们愿意为摆盘和氛围买单的冲动在减弱，转而开始寻求一种体面而高性价比的社交空间。

在这样的节奏中，上岛咖啡、米萝咖啡、老树咖啡、良木缘、绿茵阁、豪享来等颇具年代感的老式咖啡餐吧，又开始悄悄爬上了年轻人的打卡清单。

二三十年前，它们是城市里最洋气的餐厅，菜单上写着影视剧男女主角才会点的黑椒牛排意面和卡布奇诺咖啡。隔壁桌是商务人士谈生意，或是时髦情侣在约会，小朋友则眼巴巴地等着大人给自己点上一碗香蕉船。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $80,000 on or before June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump Iran deal narrative and spot ETF inflows compete with analyst forecasts of $60K crash; geopolitical peace premium vs. macro headwinds create binary volatility.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement' + Cointelegraph: 'Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level' + spot ETF outflows ($2.26B in two weeks)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Cointelegraph analyst view that 'Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes' contradicts mainstream expectation; inflation signals (travel, food, recreation) remain sticky but may soften.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph: 'Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst' + CNBC: 'Americans are feeling inflation's pinch' (May 5 data point)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will U.S.-Iran Strait of Hormuz deal be formally signed by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump explicitly stated deal is 'largely negotiated' and 'will be announced soon'; fragile ceasefire since April 8 creates near-term resolution window.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz largely negotiated, will be announced soon' + 'fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVDA stock outperform SPY by >10% through December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Chinese AI competition (36Kr conference signals 'AI eyeglasses' and 'embodied AI' as killer apps) and domestic AI margin pressure vs. renewed chipset cycle demand from robotics and enterprise agents.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: 36Kr: '下一个杀手级AI产品…连接物理世界' (next killer app = physical world interface, robotics) + CoinDesk AI token rally signal

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will travel bookings decline >15% YoY in June 2026 vs. June 2025?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI or Anthropic announce a new $10B+ valuation round by December 31, 2026?

investment_theses.thesis: BTC/USD breaks above $82K by end of June 2026 on Iran deal geopolitical premium offsetting macro rate-cut uncertainty; sell into strength above $85K.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin heads higher as President Trump announces Iran peace agreement'
Trump explicit statement: Iran deal 'largely negotiated, will be announced soon'
BTC spot ETF inflows resume if geopolitical risk premium persists
investment_theses.counter_view: Analyst consensus for $60K crash and persistent spot ETF outflows ($2.26B in two weeks) signal macro headwinds (stagflation, rate hold) override geopolitical upside.
investment_theses.expression: BTC/USD perpetual futures (3–5x leverage, long position, June 2026 expiry) or spot BTC with 2/20 stop-loss at $72K

investment_theses.thesis: DXY weakens to 97–98 range by October 2026 if Fed cuts rates even once; short USD pairs (DXY futures or USD/JPY) into summer strength.

Fed fund futures pricing inconsistent with analyst expectations
Trump Iran deal reduces geopolitical risk premium on safe-haven dollar
investment_theses.counter_view: Sticky inflation (travel, food, recreation up sharply) may force Fed to hold or even hike; dollar strength persists if global growth falters.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY futures (CME) or long foreign currency basket (EUR/USD, GBP/USD long ETF) with June 2026 target of DXY < 98

investment_theses.thesis: NVDA outperforms SPY by 10–15% through YE 2026 as enterprise AI agent deployments and robotics chips (36Kr signals embodied AI as next platform) drive capex cycle.
supporting_signals: 36Kr: 'next killer app = eyeglasses, agents, or unnamed physical world interface; only products with real-time interaction, connected to physical world survive'
Chinese robotics/AI chip startups raising (维泛智能 seed round) signal global capex acceleration
CoinDesk: AI tokens leading altcoin rally = smart money pricing in AI infrastructure boom

investment_theses.thesis: Consumer discretionary weakness (travel, entertainment, dining) persists through Q3 2026; short XLY or long bonds (TLT) on stagflation playbook.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'Americans feeling inflation's pinch' in travel, food, recreation
Spirit Airlines collapse signals airline margin erosion
'Blue dot fever' and concert 'date-flation' = conscious spending pullback
Millennials reducing date frequency due to cost ($252 avg spend)
investment_theses.counter_view: Memorial Day weekend booking surge contradicts recession thesis; consumer resilience may extend into summer; energy prices falling could ease inflation pressure.

investment_theses.thesis: HYPE and AI-native tokens outperform BTC/ETH by 25–40% through August 2026 as agent protocols and on-chain AI infrastructure narrative accelerates.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Crypto trader sees Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally'
36Kr conference consensus: 'only long-running, connected-to-physical-world AI products survive' = on-chain AI agents as infrastructure layer
HYPE trending on crypto feeds = retail + whale accumulation phase

investment_theses.expression: Long HYPE/USDC spot or 3x leverage long (Hyperliquid perpetuals); target 100+ USD by August 2026, stop-loss 50% below entry
